coverage: Every reachable node type across all four active modifier roots has a browser handler.
validation: The bill, front-shell deformation, and sampling cube have exact topology and matching silhouettes. The source file has a hat-front/embroidery dependency cycle, so the embroidery truth render freezes the exact 60,105 / 59,680 evaluated front before evaluating the stitch graph. The browser reproduces the intended SEND NODES lettering and stitch flow at about 12% denser topology.
